creator: tmclaugh@sdf.lonestar.org
text:
The port still hasn't made its way into the FreeBSD tree and I haven't
seen Phillip in weeks.  Not to mention that this port was done
independently from Phillip.  I'm keeping this PR open until I sort out
what to to with the ports owned by BSD#.
--

| FreeBSD                                       http://www.FreeBSD.org |
